message:
fix(freeze): sync closure variables back to locals after calls

When a closure writes to a captured variable via var_refs, it updates
_locals_jsv but the parent function reads from locals. This caused
closure writes to be lost (e.g., forEach callback updating sum).

The fix syncs _locals_jsv back to locals after any call that could
execute a closure. To avoid overwriting valid values with UNDEFINED
(since _locals_jsv is initialized to UNDEFINED), we track whether a
closure has been created in the current function and only sync after.

Also:
- Use bytecode index directly for closure variable access
- Detach var_ref_list at all return points to prevent double-free
- Add var_ref_list detach to tail call paths

Test: RxJS comprehensive tests pass (27/27)
